{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chaotic Dragon Scale
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10711
|idx=69
|description="They bore witness to the birth of the cosmos, the rise and ruin of countless civilizations, and the endless cycles of rebirth…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Unleash Annihilation Breath, reducing the enemy's DEF by 60% this round. Deal an additional DMG equal to 3% of the enemy's Max HP for each stack of Annihilation, up to a maximum of 100% of your ATK!
|hp=2172
|def=239
|atk=387
|rush=226
|gene1=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -8%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, HIT +12%
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} RUSH +140
|gene4=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +4%
|gene5=Snail Arena, dodge rate +12%
|gene6=In Snail Arena, CRIT +20%
|gene7=Bind RES +4% (Awakened)
|}}
